publications_must_include_substrings: On-device personalization with bounded privacy budgets
Robust federated averaging under adversarial clients
Practical secure aggregation for federated learning
notes: Academic CV stress test. Three degrees, multi-line publications with author lists and venues, distinct 'Academic Appointments' section instead of 'Experience'. The 'Awards and Honors' section is intentionally not certifications and should NOT be picked up there. The 'Dr.' prefix on the name is a parsing trap.
